title: Remote input-asset transfer: video/audio/latent upload (non-image inputs)
description: Promoted from MPI-64 Phase 4 (plan line 140) / OPEN-ITEMS B1. Remote mode currently injects video/audio as ABSOLUTE LOCAL filesystem paths (_resolveMediaPath) read by VHS nodes from disk — which breaks on a remote Pod. Implement wrapper upload/staging for all non-image inputs: (1) video/audio upload replacing local-path injection; (2) the trimmed-video flow (trim locally via /api/video/trim-input, then upload the trimmed clip); (3) remote .latent staging replacing /comfy/stage-preview-latent (the multi-stage preview path). The wrapper already has /wrapper/upload/media + /wrapper/upload/latent (Phase 2). Code PARTIALLY shipped + uncommitted, NOT live-verified (see current-architecture.md §10 'Remote input-asset transfer'). Blocks remote video-INPUT ops (upscale/resize/interpolate/extend with a real input + I2V trimmed input + two-stage preview). App. See brief.md.
